escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 Chinese memory components penetrating major OEMs — Lenovo adopting YMTC SSDs in flagship laptops, MSI completing CXMT DDR5 tuning on AMD platforms, Acer using BiWIN modules with CXMT particles. Does NOT alter 2026 tight supply outlook — Chinese capacity still insufficient to offset HBM-driven DRAM wafer allocation (>25% of DRAM wafers now HBM).
